files.description: Core sandbox architecture: mounted semantic operational layer concept, 3-component architecture (certified reference, sandbox namespace, isolation boundary), namespace structure with 7 subsystems, 4-state sandbox lifecycle, 7 invariants

3 boundary types (read-only, write-contained, forbidden), enforcement model (physical namespace, hash-verified reads, non-persistence, origin tagging), 6 violation types with response protocols, BlueEdge-specific constraints
Protection for structural/semantic/qualification baselines, 4 protection mechanisms, 3 recovery guarantees, 8 BlueEdge invariants, 7 failure scenarios (all NONE baseline impact)
Namespace identity/addressing/scoping, one namespace per client-run, 5 isolation guarantees, overlay execution within namespace, 4-state namespace state machine, cross-namespace rules
6-input sandbox replay model, 8-step reconstruction with sandbox context, 5 replay scenarios, 6 determinism guarantees, 6 failure handling protocols
6 automatic + 5 governance rollback triggers, rollback point architecture (5 types), 4 rollback operations, 3 recovery operations, replay chain preservation, cleanup manifest
Mounting concept (filesystem overlay analogy), 4 mount operations, mount registry with 5 invariants, origin visibility (6 attribution contexts, 5 prohibited operations), mount count zero property
3 failure categories (contained/escalated/critical), 5-zone containment architecture, fail-closed boundary, 3 response protocols, non-propagation guarantees, 8 BlueEdge scenarios
6 auditability properties, 20 audit event types, hash chain integrity, 10 mandatory queries, mandatory disclosure (5 items, 4 levels), audit persistence and retention

8 mandatory rules (no outside execution, no canonical mutation, no hidden persistence, no implicit precedence, no autonomous mutation, replay-reconstructable, origins visible, deterministic rollback), enforcement model, exception model
3-level certification taxonomy (pipeline/sandbox/not-certifiable), certification boundary matrix, composite state NOT pipeline-certified, 4-level certification hierarchy, promotion rules
9-point path boundary compliance with sandbox-specific verification, data flow diagram, 10 design questions answered with cross-references, governance confirmation
Pre-flight confirmation, scope, 7 upstream references, 12 execution steps, governance confirmation
File change manifest for stream execution
Stream closure with completion status, validation summary, governance confirmation

governance_notes: Specification-only contract. No runtime artifacts produced. No validators modified. No existing artifacts mutated. Architecture defines isolated execution envelope for future controlled overlay execution.
